title: Angel One is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Angel One is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Angel One in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
